subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! Today is the Day of service and the Day of remembrance. This is a day that hath no likeness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله الیوم یوم خدمت است و یوم ذکر است امروز روزی است که شبیه و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @thankfulness; gratitude
